subcodes.first_line: O Safar-'Alí! We have heard thy call and from the precincts of the Prison have turned towards thee. Today from the rustling of the Divine Lote-Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا صفر قبل علی ندایت را شنیدیم و از شطر سجن بتو توجه نمودیم امروز از حفیف سدره منتهی
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God
